name: Quick Adversarial Review
description: Generate a primary review, then have an independent verifier challenge it.

defaultParams.rubric: Prioritize correctness, missing tests, behavioral regressions, and unresolved risk.

script: const { subject, rubric } = workflow.params; const primary = await workflow.agent(`Review ${subject}. Rubric: ${rubric}`, { title: 'Primary reviewer', agentType: 'reviewer' }); const verified = await workflow.patterns.adversarialVerify({ result: primary.text, verifier: (text) => workflow.agent(`Challenge this review. Find false positives, missed risks, and weak evidence.\n${text}`, { title: 'Adversarial verifier', agentType: 'verifier' }) }); workflow.artifact('quick-adversarial-review', { subject, rubric, primary, verified }); return { subject, primary, verified };
